h1: Shingle Comparisons: Side-by-Side Reviews of Every Major Brand
hub_intro: Eleven head-to-head comparisons across the seven major asphalt shingle brands. Every page has the same shape: a draggable visual comparison at the top, a spec table with real numbers in every cell, a decision rubric, install pricing context from Florida contractors, and verified quotes from r/Roofing. Sorted by search popularity so the highest-interest comparisons surface first.

comparison_cards.title: Owens Corning Duration vs GAF Timberline HDZ
comparison_cards.short_blurb: The classic mid-tier matchup. SureNail vs LayerLock, identical 130 mph wind rating, $8/sq material difference.

comparison_cards.title: CertainTeed Landmark vs GAF Timberline HDZ
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Heaviest shingle in class (Landmark) versus the most-installed shingle in America (HDZ). $3-5/sq material difference.

comparison_cards.title: GAF Timberline HDZ vs Owens Corning Duration
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Same matchup as #1 but framed brand-first. GAF cheaper at retail; OC heavier feel and SureNail strip.

comparison_cards.title: CertainTeed Landmark vs Landmark Pro
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Sibling matchup: Pro is 40 lbs/sq heavier, adds 5 years to algae warranty, unlocks the Max Def color palette. $30/sq more.

comparison_cards.title: IKO Cambridge vs GAF Timberline HDZ
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Budget vs premium. IKO costs 10-20% less. HDZ wins on warranty length, algae coverage, color count.

comparison_cards.title: Owens Corning Duration vs CertainTeed Landmark
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Direct cross-brand competitor matchup. Specs nearly identical; difference is contractor preference and local supply.

comparison_cards.title: GAF Timberline HDZ vs Owens Corning Duration (Product-Level)
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Product-level long-tail of comparison #1. Differentiates from the brand-level page via product-specific FAQ angles.

comparison_cards.title: Malarkey Vista vs GAF Timberline HDZ
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Premium SBS rubberized asphalt + Class 4 hail (Vista) versus the standard-bearer GAF. Vista costs $30-60/sq more.

comparison_cards.title: GAF Timberline HDZ vs CertainTeed Landmark (Product-Level)
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Product-level long-tail of comparison #2. Differentiates via product-specific FAQ and rotated Reddit quotes.

comparison_cards.title: Owens Corning Duration vs Duration Designer
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Sibling matchup: Designer is the aesthetic upgrade tier. Same performance specs, larger granules, premium Max Def colors, 15-20% more.

comparison_cards.title: IKO Cambridge vs GAF Timberline HDZ (Product-Level)
comparison_cards.short_blurb: Product-level long-tail of comparison #5. Same subjects, differentiated FAQ around specific Cambridge install experiences.

faq_items.q: Why are some shingles listed in multiple comparisons?
faq_items.a: GAF Timberline HDZ is the most-installed residential shingle in the U.S., so it appears in 8 of the 11 comparisons here. Other shingles appear multiple times where they're directly cross-shopped against different competitors.

faq_items.q: How do I pick which comparison to read?
faq_items.a: Start with the two shingles your contractor quoted you on, or the two you saw on neighbors' houses. Each page has the same shape — visual at the top, specs table, decision rubric, and FAQ — so you can find the same information in the same place across all 11.
No. The brand order is set by monthly search volume, not by any commercial agreement. The visualizer SKU library is curated by what each manufacturer publishes, not by paid placement.

faq_items.q: Why isn't TAMKO or Atlas covered yet?
faq_items.a: Phase 1 covers the five highest-volume brands by national install count. TAMKO and Atlas are in scope for future expansion as we add more shingle SKU detail pages.
